description: Sample email inputs for Chain 1 and Chain 2. Pass only subject, body, and thread_context to your chains.

emails.source_inspiration: Assignment example 1; typical buyer mockup request
emails.subject: Need mockup sample for RI15104
emails.body:
Hi,
Please arrange mockup sample for RI15104 with trims and submit RD by Friday.
Thanks.
emails.thread_context: First sampling request from this buyer for Holiday 26 program.

emails.source_inspiration: Cleaned email em_20260416_095506 (S27 FM Sample Yardage thread)
emails.subject: RE: S27 FM Sample Yardage Request - ST-2045
emails.body:
Hi Subish,
Pls get back the RD by this week for ST-2045.
We need yardage approval before bulk fabric booking.
Thanks,
Theia
emails.thread_context: Prior message from vendor: yardage sent via DHL AWB 9619285281 for Spring 27 fabric development testing.

emails.source_inspiration: Cleaned email em_20260415_105131 (GARAN OLX SAMPLE REQUEST)
emails.subject: GARAN OLX FIT Sample Request - RI14822
emails.body:
Dear Team,
Attached is the Garan Fall-26 OLX FIT sample request form for style RI14822.
Kindly initiate proto sample and confirm timeline.
Regards,
Subish

emails.source_inspiration: Cleaned email em_20260415_114052 (Hanna Soft Jersey costing + proto)
emails.subject: RE: Hol-26 Hanna Soft Jersey – Costing & Proto Sample for RI15201
emails.body:
Dear Sathish,
As discussed, please use the fabric price from my previous mail and advise your capacity along with new and revised costings for RI15201.
Based on capacity and costing we will proceed with proto samples. Share details by tomorrow.
Regards,
Sabari
emails.thread_context: Previous mail shared Hanna Soft Jersey program with 6 body styles and target FOB prices.

emails.source_inspiration: Costing thread follow-up; style ref only in context
emails.subject: RE: Revised costing submission
emails.body:
Hi,
Any update on the revised costing we discussed last week?
Please confirm if you can meet the CRD.
Thanks.
emails.thread_context: Thread about ST-2045 and RI15201 costing for Fall 26 program. Buyer waiting for updated FOB before PO release.

emails.subject: RE: PO# 234917(3033031) - Not Reflected into GTN Portal - PTS #562212270220
emails.body:
Hi Ravi,
Pls allow me to share updated PO with updating ship mode.
Pls confirm your receiving and confirm the booking ASAP.
Thanks,
Inul
emails.thread_context: Buyer reported PO 234917 not reflected on GTN portal. Forwarder and merchandising teams are on copy.

emails.source_inspiration: Cleaned email em_20260513_094948 (Delta Galil pre-booking / PO 3034587)
emails.subject: RE: DELTA GALIL PANAMA - PRE BOOKING (BEST CORP) - PO# 3034587 - CRD 08.05.2026
emails.body:
Dear exports team,
Noted your message. DN shall follow ASAP once sailed.
Please confirm vessel details for PO 3034587.
Best Regards,
Rajesh
emails.thread_context: Pre-booking thread for Panama shipment. Invoice 57/2627, carton 29. Style RI15104 referenced in earlier PO attachment.

emails.source_inspiration: Cleaned email em_20260513_111316 (Cheat Sheet - M&M Orders)
emails.subject: RE: Cheat Sheet - M&M Orders
emails.body:
Hi Vijay,
As discussed in the WIP meeting, please provide the cheat sheet and packaging details for all related programs.
Thanks for your help!
Anisul
emails.thread_context: Internal WIP meeting follow-up. No specific style action requested in this message.

emails.source_inspiration: Cleaned email em_20260513_105407 (elastic rejection / production plan)
emails.subject: RE: Reg. ELASTIC REJECTION INFORMATION
emails.body:
Dear Vijay,
We have re-looked into the production plan and will try to finish production by 22/5 barring unforeseen circumstances.
Best Regards,
Artidech
emails.thread_context: Ongoing thread about elastic quality rejection. No new sample or costing request in this reply.

emails.source_inspiration: Cleaned email em_20260513_123828 (Undelivered Mail Returned to Sender)

emails.body:
This is the mail system at host ncismumsmtp46.netcore.co.in.
